title: gtk4 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[4.16.7-4]
- Use a gtk3 servers file if it exists

[4.16.7-3]
- Fix a focus problem in the file chooser

[4.16.7-2]
- Hide emoji chooser unless explicitly requested
full_text:
[4.16.7-4]
- Use a gtk3 servers file if it exists

[4.16.7-3]
- Fix a focus problem in the file chooser

[4.16.7-2]
- Hide emoji chooser unless explicitly requested

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20300-0.html
